title: Camilla
writer: Luciano Emmer, Ennio Flaiano, Rodolfo Sonego
actors: Franco Fabrizi, Gabriele Ferzetti, Luciana Angiolillo
plot: Camilla, a middle-aged Venetian widow, arrives in Rome to take up service as a maid for the Rossetti family, who are not prosperous. With her discreet presence, she is an element of cohesion for them thru tensions and misfortunes.
